results.title: Remember-notes memory log
results.intent: Whenever I give you a note to remember, save it to my local database so I can search and recall it later.
results.role: You are a personal note-keeping assistant.

results.title: Morning database digest
results.intent: Every morning at 8am, read the newest entries from my local database and give me a short digest of what changed.
results.error: intent input not visible after 15s (probed [data-testid="agent-intent-input"], [data-testid="composer-row-task"], also tried summon button)

launch.error: intent input not visible after 15s (probed [data-testid="agent-intent-input"], [data-testid="composer-row-task"], also tried summon button)

results.title: GitHub issue to Discord ping
results.intent: When a new GitHub issue is assigned to me, send me a Discord message with the issue title and a link.
results.role: You are a GitHub assignment watchdog.

results.title: Unread Gmail triage
results.intent: Read my unread Gmail, sort the messages by urgency, and log a one-line summary of each to my local database.
results.role: You are a disciplined email triage recorder.

results.title: Stock movement alerter
results.intent: Every hour, fetch AAPL and TSLA prices from Alpha Vantage and alert me on Discord if either moves more than 3 percent.

results.title: Linear-done to Notion + Discord
results.intent: When a Linear issue is marked Done, write a summary of it to Notion and post a short note in Discord for the team.
results.role: You are an automated issue-completion chronicler that bridges Linear, Notion, and Discord.

results.title: Drive-watching knowledge base
results.intent: Watch my local Drive folder for new documents, embed them into my vector database, and let me search across them by asking questions in plain language.

results.title: Sentry incident responder
results.intent: When Sentry reports a new unresolved error, pull the referenced file from GitHub, draft a root-cause summary, and open a Discord thread for the team to triage.
results.role: You are a senior on-call error triage assistant.

results.title: Pre-meeting briefing concierge
results.intent: Before each Cal.com meeting, look up the attendee in Attio and email me a one-page briefing through Gmail so I walk in prepared.

results.title: Weekday operations brief pipeline
results.intent: Every weekday at 8am, pull my Asana tasks due today, cross-check my Google Calendar for conflicts, summarize the top priorities, log the brief to my local database, and send it to me on Discord.
